name: SCC_ErrorStateInd
title: SCC_ErrorStateInd
syntax: void SCC_ErrorStateInd ( byte SessionID[], long ErrorState )
description: The callback is called as soon as the node enters or exits the error state.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
